source.section: 6 - Markpoints > 6.2 - How to Add Markpoints > Overfly Method

steps.action: Make sure that no target is designated with any sensor (targeting pod, air-to-ground radar, waypoint designate). Use the Undesignate Button if you wish to un-designate a target.
Fly over the location you want to mark
From either the HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator) or the SA (Situational Awareness) page, press the OSB (Option Select Button) next to MK#.

The MK# will increment and the markpoint will be created at the coordinates you were at when pressing the MK# OSB. (Note: Once MK#9 is created (the last of the 9 available markpoints), the next created MK# will overwrite MK#1, and so on and so forth.) 6 - MARKPOINTS
